definition: A formal system for computation using variables abstraction application and reduction.
A name or placeholder in a lambda expression.
A lambda expression defining a function over a bound variable.
A variable not bound by a surrounding abstraction.
A variable introduced by a lambda abstraction.
Renaming bound variables without changing meaning.
Applying a function by substituting the argument into the body.
A rule relating a function that simply applies another function to that function.
Representing data such as numbers and Booleans using functions.
